pages.title: What are ADRs in SSOT Registry?
pages.description: ADRs matter because SSOT Registry turns them into named, normalized, inspectable SSOT records instead of leaving developers to reconstruct intent from scattered documents. This features guide explains the concept, shows where it fits in the SSOT canon, and points to practical next steps for a governed single source of truth.
